title: oenothera muricata subsp. parviflora
intro: Oenothera muricata subsp. parviflora, also known as the small-flowered evening primrose, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera muricata subsp. parviflora include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wound healing. Oenothera muricata subsp. parviflora can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
